summary: Plan-mode inventory classification. The compacted preflight artifact hydrated 20 candidate PRs; hydrated non-security open PRs are kept independently for maintainer review, #51822 and #64546 are routed to central security handling, and #75213 is already closed. The remaining listed candidates were not hydrated in the provided artifact, so no close/merge/fix action is planned for them.
